Username must be 3-16 characters!: Feumaidh an t-ainm-cleachdaidh a bhith 3-16 caractaran!
Password must contain at least one upper: Feumaidh co-dhiù aon litir mhòr a bhith ann am facal-faire!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Feumaidh am facal-faire a bhith eadar 8-16 caractaran!
Not your preferred language?: Nach e an cànan as fheàrr leat?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Feumaidh co-dhiù aon samhla a bhith ann am facal-faire!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Feumaidh Fad Ainm-cleachdaidh a bhith Eadar 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Feumaidh Fad Facal-faire a bhith Eadar 8-16
Already have an account?: A bheil cunntas agad mu thràth?
Password must contain at least one lower: Feumaidh co-dhiù aon litir litrichean beaga a bhith ann am facal-faire!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Feumaidh co-dhiù aon àireamh a bhith ann am facal-faire!
